name: cekura-skills
description: Claude Code plugins for Cekura AI voice agent testing and evaluation

plugins.name: cekura
plugins.description: Core Cekura plugin — platform onboarding for new users, skill coordination across all Cekura plugins, and marketplace management (upgrade skills).

plugins.name: cekura-metrics
plugins.description: Create, improve, and validate metrics for AI voice agent call quality evaluation. Includes metric design best practices, labs improvement workflow, and anti-pattern detection.

plugins.name: cekura-evals
plugins.description: Create, run, and analyze test suites for AI voice agent testing. Includes eval design best practices, test profiles, conditional actions, and coverage planning.
